name: Sonoma Raceway (real GPS)

corners.name: Turn 1
corners.coaching_tip: carry throttle through, swing tight to the K-wall bend

corners.name: Turn 2
corners.coaching_tip: you can brake less than you think; carry speed uphill

corners.name: Turn 3
corners.coaching_tip: give-away corner — sacrifice T3 entry to win T3a and T4

markers.label: the light poles in the stands

corners.name: Turn 4
corners.coaching_tip: downhill, off-camber — back the brake up by one marker

markers.label: where the left wall steps up

corners.name: Turn 5
corners.coaching_tip: throwaway corner — preserve T6 entry, breathe the throttle

corners.name: Turn 6
corners.coaching_tip: smooth exit — speed here carries the long straight; no early throttle

markers.label: the tire stacks on the left
the corner station on the right

corners.name: Turn 7
corners.coaching_tip: eyes up — late turn-in, late apex; second apex matters more

corners.name: Turn 8
corners.coaching_tip: smooth, don't pinch — apexes all slightly late, throttle on exit

corners.name: Turn 9
corners.coaching_tip: setup for T10 — exit T8a at full throttle

corners.name: Turn 10
corners.coaching_tip: lift, don't brake — fastest corner; carry full throttle past apex

corners.name: Turn 11
corners.coaching_tip: wait for the bump to settle, trail to the apex, all the road on exit

markers.label: the bump where the road widens left
markers.note: best brake reference — wait for the car to compress and settle

markers.label: the pit-entry lines on the left
the start of the tire stacks on the left
the light poles in the stands
where the left wall steps up
the tire stacks on the left
the corner station on the right
the bump where the road widens left
markers.note: best brake reference — wait for the car to compress and settle

markers.label: the pit-entry lines on the left
the start of the tire stacks on the left

intel_notes.weather_pattern: morning fog burns off mid-morning; cool damp surface in first session of an HPDE day
common_strategy_notes: T3 is a give-away — sacrifice T3 to win T3a and T4
T5 is throwaway — preserve T6 entry
T6 carousel punishes early throttle (off-camber + downhill)
T10 is fastest — most drivers brake when they only need a lift
T11 has no painted brake marker — use the bump in the road

note: All `real_lat` / `real_lon` fields are in real Sonoma GPS frame (~38.16°N, -122.45°W). Anonymised distance positions are mapped to real GPS by fractional position around the closed loop. Use this file for any map UI; use sonoma.json for analytics that need to match the dataset's anonymised coords.
